prestazioni: N54B30A (3.0L twin-turbo inline-6) hybrid turbo upgrade with Garrett GT3582R ball-bearing turbos (62mm compressor, 76mm turbine) paired with custom 3.5" V-band downpipes and a CSF high-flow aluminum radiator with integrated oil cooler for sustained 650whp on E85 (requires ported N54 cylinder head by VAC Motorsports and upgraded fuel system with dual Walbro 450LPH pumps + ID1000 injectors)

Full drivetrain reinforcement: MFactory 3.91:1 LSD with billet side gears, upgraded 8HP24Z transmission with a Level 10 JB4 transmission controller (TCU flash), and a South Bend Stage 3+ dual-disc clutch with a lightweight aluminum flywheel (18lb) for 0-60mph in 3.8s

Suspension overhaul with KW Variant 3 coilovers (E65-specific valving), Eibach Pro-Spacer 20mm wheel spacers (hub-centric, 5x120), and M Performance 40mm front sway bar with polyurethane bushings (replaces OEM 28mm) for reduced body roll and improved turn-in response
estetica: AC Schnitzer ACS7 Sport aerodynamic kit (E65-specific front splitter, side skirts, and rear diffuser with carbon fiber weave), paired with a custom 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap (Xpel Stealth finish) and debadged kidney grilles
OEM+ lighting upgrade: LUX V3 Angel Eyes (5500K CRI 90+), Osram Night Breaker Laser H7/H11 bulbs, and rear LED taillights from a 760Li (E66) with smoked reflectors for a modernized look

Interior transformation: Recaro Pole Position seats (E65-specific mounting brackets) with Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses, M-Tech II steering wheel (Nappa leather with red stitching), and a custom carbon fiber center console overlay (by 3D Carbon) housing an AiM MXL2 data logger and a JB4 G5 ISO module
